name: Troll Warlord
description: I suffer the innocents and guilty alike. There are no innocents. Jah'rakal, the Troll Warlord

abilities.name: Battle Stance
abilities.description: Toggle On swaps to Melee Form. Reduces Troll's base attack time and base attack range in Melee Form. Berserker's Rage grants the Troll's attacks different bonus correspondingly to the toggled Form.

abilities.name: Whirling Axes (Ranged)
abilities.description: Now applies all ability effects normally on debuff immune units. The ranged Whirling Axes now dispel affected enemy units. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

abilities.name: Whirling Axes (Melee)
abilities.description: Now applies all ability effects normally on debuff immune units. The melee Whirling Axes now self-dispels. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

abilities.name: Fervor
abilities.description: grants bonus armor per stack while in Melee Form.

abilities.name: Berserker’s Rage
abilities.description: Attacks in Ranged Form on the affected enemy unit have a chance to additionally slow and deal bonus physical spell damage. Melee Form passively grants Troll bonus armor and bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Battle Trance
abilities.description: Battle Trance can now be cast while disabled. The ability additionally applies a self-strong dispel upon cast. Additionally grants allied heroes bonus attack speed bonus while active.
